mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cls.COURSE_LEARNING_ID) FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = cls.COURSE_ID JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = cls.USER_ID LEFT JOIN COURSE_APPLICATION ca ON ca.APPLICATION_ID = cls.APPLICATION_ID WHERE NVL(ca.APPLIED_AT, cls.UPDATED_AT) >= #{filter.startDate} AND NVL(ca.APPLIED_AT, cls.UPDATED_AT) < #{filter.endDate} + 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.COURSE_TITLE AS courseTitle, CASE c.COURSE_TYPE WHEN 'ONLINE' THEN '온라인' WHEN 'OFFLINE' THEN '오프라인' ELSE c.COURSE_TYPE END AS courseTypeLabel, u.NAME AS learnerName, NVL(d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, '-') AS departmentName, NVL(cls.PROGRESS_RATE, 0) AS progressRate, CASE WHEN COUNT(qa.ATTEMPT_ID) = 0 THEN '미응시' WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT qa.CHAPTER_ID) < COUNT(DISTINCT cc.CHAPTER_ID) THEN '일부 응시' ELSE '응시 완료' END AS quizStatusLabel, CASE WHEN cls.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN '수료' WHEN cls.STATUS = 'CANCELED' THEN '미수료' ELSE '미수료' END AS completionStatusLabel, CASE WHEN cls.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 'green' WHEN cls.STATUS = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 'blue' WHEN cls.STATUS = 'NOT_STARTED' THEN 'amber' ELSE 'gray' END AS completionTone, NVL(TO_CHAR(cls.COMPLETED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD'), '-') AS completedAtStr FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = cls.COURSE_ID JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = cls.USER_ID LEFT JOIN COURSE_APPLICATION ca ON ca.APPLICATION_ID = cls.APPLICATION_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID = u.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN COURSE_CHAPTER cc ON cc.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID AND cc.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN QUIZ_ATTEMPT qa ON qa.USER_ID = cls.USER_ID AND qa.COURSE_ID = cls.COURSE_ID AND qa.CHAPTER_ID = cc.CHAPTER_ID WHERE NVL(ca.APPLIED_AT, cls.UPDATED_AT) >= #{filter.startDate} AND NVL(ca.APPLIED_AT, cls.UPDATED_AT) < #{filter.endDate} + 1
GROUP BY cls.COURSE_LEARNING_ID, c.COURSE_TITLE, c.COURSE_TYPE, u.NAME, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, cls.PROGRESS_RATE, cls.STATUS, cls.COMPLETED_AT, cls.UPDATED_AT ORDER BY cls.UPDATED_AT DESC, cls.COURSE_LEARNING_ID DESC ) OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
